3D Visualization Mockups

Potential backgrounds for SONGSUGAR - click to view fullscreen

Geometric Tunnel

Flying through rings that pulse to BEAT/VIBE/MELODY. High energy, good for intense gameplay.

View Fullscreen

Particle Field

Three particle systems, one per audio category. Organic, flowing movement.

View Fullscreen

3D Waveform Terrain

Audio-reactive landscape with spectrum bars. Retro-futuristic aesthetic.

View Fullscreen

Minimal Orbs

Clean, unobtrusive. Three glowing orbs represent each audio category. Won't distract from gameplay.

View Fullscreen

Shader Plasma

Pure GPU shader effect. Most performant option - runs entirely on graphics card.

View Fullscreen

CSS Lightweight (Recommended)

Pure CSS + minimal JS. ~0.1% CPU, GPU accelerated, mobile-safe. Best for production.

View Fullscreen

Integrated - Analogue

Warm rust/teal/salmon palette with CSS background. Audio-reactive orbs pulse with gameplay.

View Fullscreen

Integrated - Signal

Neon cyan/pink/lime palette with scanlines. Cyberpunk aesthetic with glowing tiles.

View Fullscreen
6 Complete Palettes

Final Palette Selection

Complete theme mockups: Signal, Analogue, Vaporwave, Midnight, Sunrise, Arctic. Each with wordmark, tiles, retro-stack messages, and UI.

View All Palettes
🔊
Sound Palette

In-Game Sound Options

Preview all game sound effects: collapses, combos, special tiles, danger warnings. Three style options (Percussive, Melodic, Hybrid) all tuned to C minor to blend with loops.

Listen to Sounds

Technical Notes

  • All mockups use Three.js (WebGL) - runs in any modern browser
  • Currently using simulated audio - would connect to real AudioContext analyzer
  • Can be rendered behind game canvas with CSS layering
  • Shader version (#5) has lowest CPU overhead
  • All effects can be intensity-adjusted based on game state
  • Could fade/blur during active gameplay, intensify during combos
